calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:17am

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Appellant, Petra Entertainment, Inc represented by owner Ibrahim Karadshe and Fadi Hanani, they both appear Pro Per. Respondent, Naveed Anwar, appears in Pro Per. Parties,previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR: Group A, 13 pages (email threads, scanned tickets, arena seating chart, copy of cancelled check and breakdown of money lost.)

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

9:30am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Continued To Mar-06-12 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Reset From Jan-17-12 To Feb-02-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
